episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 489: Avatar Bends The End of 2025 MTG
episode.description:
James and Cliff go over the hottest paper and digital cardboard this week, the latest metagame results, their cards to watch for the week and take a look at the hottest new Avatar x MTG cards revealed this week.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
